summary: Frontend testing of new features: toggle mensuel/annuel on /offres and /, renaming Prime→Intégral, bandeau Sur mesure, FAQ accordion, CTA final. 15/16 tests passed. One minor content bug found: 'Prime' still appears in a FAQ question title on /offres.

issues: 'Prime' (old offer name) still appears in FAQ question 'Quelle est la différence entre Pro et Prime ?' (faqsOffres[5] in content.js). Should be 'Quelle est la différence entre Pro et Intégral ?'. The answer body of that FAQ also references 'Prime' multiple times. Also faq-off-3 answer says 'Pro ou Prime'. Minor: options[2].price says 'Disponible dès Prime' but this is not rendered on /offres page.

action_items: Fix content.js faqsOffres[5] (faq-off-6): Change question from 'Quelle est la différence entre Pro et Prime ?' to 'Quelle est la différence entre Pro et Intégral ?' and update answer body to replace 'Prime' with 'Intégral'.
Fix content.js faqsOffres[2] (faq-off-3): Answer contains 'Pro ou Prime' — should be 'Pro ou Intégral'.
Optional: Fix content.js options[2] (opt-3): price says 'Disponible dès Prime' — not currently rendered on /offres but should be updated for consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: content.js faqsOffres array (lines ~456-471) still references 'Prime' as an offer name in FAQ question and answers — needs to be updated to 'Intégral' to match the renaming.
content.js options[2].price = 'Disponible dès Prime' is stale but not currently rendered on /offres page.
test_credentials: No auth required for tested pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new toggle features work correctly. The only remaining issue is 'Prime' references in content.js faqsOffres (not in the offer cards/prices). Previous iterations (1-3) tested other pages with 100% pass rate. Toggle independence confirmed: isAnnualHome (Home) and isAnnual (Offres) are completely separate states.

test_results_detail./offres_annual_badge: PASS - '2 mois offerts' badge appears when annual active
test_results_detail./offres_table_sms_100: PASS - SMS row shows '100 inclus' for Intégral column
test_results_detail./offres_final_cta: PASS - 'Vous hésitez entre deux offres ?' present
test_results_detail./home_annual_badge: PASS - '2 mois offerts' appears when annual active
test_results_detail./home_toggle_independence: PASS - home toggle is independent from /offres toggle
test_results_detail./prime_word_check_home: PASS - 'Prime' does not appear on Home page
test_results_detail./prime_word_check_offres: FAIL - 'Prime' appears in FAQ question title 'Quelle est la différence entre Pro et Prime ?'
